title: Add pricing/purchase plans section and stock specialist content to Trading Solutions website

requirements.text: Add a new Pricing/Purchase section to the landing page that displays three plans with the exact plan names and prices provided by the user: “Foundation plan ; 75k”, “Growth plan ; 125k”, and “Loss recovery Specialist ;175k”. The section must be visually consistent with existing shadcn Card styling and include a clear call-to-action button on each plan (e.g., “Purchase” / “Choose Plan”) that does not require real payment processing (it can scroll to the Contact section or open an on-page inquiry state).

quotes: Foundation plan ; 75k   Growth plan ; 125k   Loss recovery Specialist ;175k    add this purchase section

acceptanceCriteria: A new section exists in frontend/src/pages/ContentPage.tsx with a stable anchor id (e.g., id="pricing") and contains exactly three plan cards.

Each plan card displays the exact plan name and price text as provided (including “k” and spacing/semicolons as shown, unless normalized for consistent typography while preserving the numbers and plan names).
Each plan card includes a CTA button that performs a non-payment action (e.g., scrolls to #contact or pre-fills a message), and no checkout/payment integration is added.
The section is responsive (single column on mobile, multi-column on desktop) and matches the site’s existing visual theme.

requirements.text: Add a “Stock Specialists” (or equivalent) section to the landing page with stock-specialist-related content (e.g., specialist capabilities, areas of expertise, and what users can expect). The content must be in English and must not promise guaranteed returns; it must remain aligned with the existing educational/disclaimer positioning.

quotes: add some stock specialist things in website

acceptanceCriteria: A new section exists in frontend/src/pages/ContentPage.tsx with a stable anchor id (e.g., id="specialists").
The section includes specialist-focused content presented as cards or structured bullet points consistent with current UI components and styling.
No text in the new section guarantees returns or contradicts the existing disclaimer language.

requirements.text: Update the site header navigation to include links to the new sections (Pricing/Purchase and Stock Specialists) while keeping existing links (Home, About, Contact) functional.

quotes: add this purchase sectionadd some stock specialist things in website

acceptanceCriteria: frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx nav includes anchors to the new section ids (e.g., #pricing and #specialists).
Clicking the new nav links scrolls to the correct sections on the page.
Existing nav links still work as before.

constraints: Do not implement real payment processing or store payment/user purchase data in the backend.
Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui or other immutable paths listed in SYSTEM_CONTEXT.
Keep all user-facing text in English.
Preserve the existing disclaimer content and ensure new content does not contradict it.
Backend must remain single-actor; only add backend logic if absolutely required by the UI changes (not expected for this request).
nonGoals: Integrating Stripe or any external payment provider.
Adding user accounts, order history, invoices, or downloadable products.
Guaranteeing trading returns or adding performance claims.
